category_title: Student with ASD and hyperactivity exhibiting self-harming behaviors and high musical engagement
minimal_context: The student is working on a puzzle with the tutor when a sudden change in the schedule requires them to switch to a picture book.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to stop working on the puzzle now because the schedule changed, and we have to read the picture book instead.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please put the puzzle away and open the book.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We have to move on to the next activity now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts punching his head and throws himself on the floor.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We need to stop working on the puzzle now because the schedule changed, and we have to read the picture book instead.

STUDENT: (Starts to cry uncontrollably.)

TUTOR: Please put the puzzle away and open the book.

STUDENT: (Continues crying uncontrollably and starts screaming.)

TUTOR: We have to move on to the next activity now.

STUDENT: (Starts punching his head and throws himself on the floor.)

context.materials: puzzles, picture books, device for changing frequencies

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When his condition worsens or when he gets upset
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: starts screaming, crying, punching his head, and throwing himself on the floor

behavior_patterns.condition: if any change happens by chance
behavior_patterns.internal_state: easily and strongly connects with things and people
